Studio

Tshepiso Jafta is a law-trained legal engineer in Johannesburg. BA Law at Wits, then nearly four years in a Justice's chambers at South Africa's Constitutional Court, now building the tooling that legal and operations teams usually only get to specify: AI document pipelines, payroll and workflow systems, and the evaluation harnesses that keep both honest.

The working rule across everything here: accuracy is measured, not asserted. Every AI claim in these projects traces to a committed, reproducible benchmark.

Focus
  • Legal engineering
  • AI document pipelines
  • Payroll & ops platforms
  • Workflow automation
  • Evaluation harnesses
Stack

  • TypeScript · React · Next.js
  • Supabase (Postgres + RLS)
  • Gemini & Anthropic APIs
  • LangGraph · LanceDB
  • n8n · Power BI · GitHub Actions
